title: Add donation section with PayPal QR code to footer

requirements.text: Add a donation section to the site-wide Footer component (frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx) that displays the uploaded PayPal QR code image (stored as frontend/public/assets/generated/paypal-qr-danielle-boylan.dim_300x300.png), the name 'Danielle Boylan', a short friendly message encouraging users to support the tool (e.g. 'If this tool helped you, consider buying me a coffee ☕'), and a label reading 'Scan to donate via PayPal'. The section should appear above the existing footer content and be visually distinct but consistent with the app's design system.

quotes: Add a donation section I can add my PayPal
I'll add the donation section to the bottom of every page (footer) featuring your PayPal QR code image with a friendly message encouraging users to support the tool.

acceptanceCriteria: The PayPal QR code image is displayed in the footer on every page of the app.
The name 'Danielle Boylan' and a friendly donation message are shown alongside the QR code.
A label 'Scan to donate via PayPal' is present beneath or beside the QR code.
The donation section appears on all seven routes (Home, Checklist, FormPrep, Evidence, Assessment, Resources, Privacy).
The section styling is consistent with the existing app design system (colours, typography, spacing).
High-contrast mode correctly applies to the donation section.

constraints: Do not modify any files listed in frontend.immutablePaths.
The PayPal QR code image must be served as a static asset from frontend/public/assets/generated/ and not routed through the backend.
nonGoals: Adding a PayPal payment integration or redirect link — QR code only.

edits: Crop to the QR code card area only, removing the surrounding light-blue background and large whitespace, keeping the PayPal label beneath the code (pp_my_qrcode_1772217875112.jpg > paypal-qr-danielle-boylan.dim_300x300.png)
